WHEAT FLOUR.label: NEUTRAL
WHEAT FLOUR.reason: Refined grain — provides energy but low in fibre. Prefer whole wheat.

WHEAT FLOUR (ATTA).label: GOOD
WHEAT FLOUR (ATTA).reason: Whole wheat flour — rich in fibre, minerals and complex carbohydrates.

WHOLE WHEAT FLOUR.label: GOOD
WHOLE WHEAT FLOUR.reason: Whole grain — retains bran and germ, high in fibre and nutrients.

WHEAT BRAN.label: GOOD
WHEAT BRAN.reason: Excellent source of dietary fibre. Supports digestive health.

OAT FLOUR.label: GOOD
OAT FLOUR.reason: High in beta-glucan fibre. Supports heart health and blood sugar control.

RICE FLOUR.label: NEUTRAL
RICE FLOUR.reason: Gluten-free grain flour. Low fibre, moderate glycaemic index.

SUGAR.label: BAD
SUGAR.reason: Refined sugar — empty calories, promotes tooth decay, spikes blood sugar.

LIQUID GLUCOSE.label: BAD
LIQUID GLUCOSE.reason: High glycaemic index syrup — rapidly spikes blood sugar. Ultra-processed.

HIGH FRUCTOSE CORN SYRUP.label: BAD
HIGH FRUCTOSE CORN SYRUP.reason: Linked to obesity, fatty liver disease and insulin resistance.

GLUCOSE SYRUP.label: BAD
GLUCOSE SYRUP.reason: Highly refined sugar syrup. Rapidly raises blood glucose.

CORN SYRUP.label: BAD
CORN SYRUP.reason: Highly processed sweetener with high glycaemic index.

INVERT SUGAR.label: BAD
INVERT SUGAR.reason: Refined sugar mixture. Causes blood sugar spikes.

MALTOSE.label: BAD
MALTOSE.reason: Very high glycaemic index sugar (GI=105). Spikes blood sugar rapidly.

HONEY.label: NEUTRAL
HONEY.reason: Natural sweetener with trace minerals and antibacterial properties. Use in moderation.

STEVIA.label: GOOD
STEVIA.reason: Natural zero-calorie sweetener. Does not spike blood sugar.

JAGGERY.label: NEUTRAL
JAGGERY.reason: Unrefined cane sugar with trace minerals (iron, calcium). Better than refined sugar but still high in calories.

REFINED PALM OIL.label: BAD
REFINED PALM OIL.reason: High in saturated fats. Linked to cardiovascular disease. Highly processed.

PALM OIL.label: BAD
PALM OIL.reason: High in saturated fat (50%). Raises LDL cholesterol.

HYDROGENATED VEGETABLE OIL.label: BAD
HYDROGENATED VEGETABLE OIL.reason: Contains trans fats — strongly linked to heart disease and stroke.

PARTIALLY HYDROGENATED OIL.label: BAD
PARTIALLY HYDROGENATED OIL.reason: Major source of harmful trans fats. Banned in many countries.

VANASPATI.label: BAD
VANASPATI.reason: Hydrogenated fat with trans fats. Increases bad cholesterol significantly.

SUNFLOWER OIL.label: NEUTRAL
SUNFLOWER OIL.reason: High in omega-6. Good in moderation but excess can cause inflammation.

OLIVE OIL.label: GOOD
OLIVE OIL.reason: Rich in monounsaturated fats and antioxidants. Excellent for heart health.

COCONUT OIL.label: NEUTRAL
COCONUT OIL.reason: High in saturated fat but with medium-chain triglycerides. Use in moderation.

MILK SOLIDS.label: NEUTRAL
MILK SOLIDS.reason: Concentrated dairy — provides protein and calcium. May concern lactose intolerant.

MILK POWDER.label: NEUTRAL
MILK POWDER.reason: Dehydrated milk — retains protein and calcium.

WHEY POWDER.label: GOOD
WHEY POWDER.reason: High quality dairy protein. Contains all essential amino acids.

WHEY PROTEIN.label: GOOD
WHEY PROTEIN.reason: Complete protein source. Supports muscle repair and satiety.

SKIMMED MILK POWDER.label: GOOD
SKIMMED MILK POWDER.reason: Low fat dairy — good protein and calcium source.

BUTTER.label: NEUTRAL
BUTTER.reason: Natural dairy fat. Contains fat-soluble vitamins. Use in moderation.

MALTODEXTRIN.label: BAD
MALTODEXTRIN.reason: Ultra-processed carbohydrate with very high GI (85-105). Spikes blood sugar rapidly. Minimal nutrition.

MODIFIED STARCH.label: BAD
MODIFIED STARCH.reason: Chemically altered starch. High GI, minimal nutrition. Ultra-processed.

CORN STARCH.label: NEUTRAL
CORN STARCH.reason: Common thickener. High glycaemic index but used in small amounts.

MALT EXTRACT.label: NEUTRAL
MALT EXTRACT.reason: Natural barley extract — adds flavour and some B vitamins. Moderate sugar content.

RAISING AGENTS.label: NEUTRAL
RAISING AGENTS.reason: Leavening agents used in baking. Generally safe in small quantities.

DOUGH CONDITIONER.label: BAD
DOUGH CONDITIONER.reason: Chemical additive to improve texture. E-223 (sodium metabisulphite) — a sulphite preservative that can trigger reactions in sensitive individuals.

IODISED SALT.label: NEUTRAL
IODISED SALT.reason: Essential mineral in small amounts. Excess sodium linked to hypertension.

SALT.label: NEUTRAL
SALT.reason: Essential in small amounts. Excess linked to high blood pressure.

EMULSIFIERS.label: NEUTRAL
EMULSIFIERS.reason: Used to blend ingredients. Safety varies by specific e-number used.

LECITHIN.label: GOOD
LECITHIN.reason: Natural emulsifier from soy or sunflower. Supports brain and liver health.

MONO AND DIGLYCERIDES.label: BAD
MONO AND DIGLYCERIDES.reason: Synthetic emulsifiers derived from fats. May contain trace trans fats.

CARRAGEENAN.label: BAD
CARRAGEENAN.reason: Linked to gut inflammation in some studies. Controversial food additive.

NATURAL FLAVOUR.label: NEUTRAL
NATURAL FLAVOUR.reason: Can originate from natural sources but processing method varies. Generally safe.

ARTIFICIAL FLAVOUR.label: BAD
ARTIFICIAL FLAVOUR.reason: Synthetic chemical flavouring. No nutritional value. May cause sensitivities.

VANILLA EXTRACT.label: GOOD
VANILLA EXTRACT.reason: Natural flavour extract with antioxidant properties.

VANILLIN.label: NEUTRAL
VANILLIN.reason: Synthetic vanilla — generally safe but artificial. No nutritional value.

SODIUM BENZOATE.label: BAD
SODIUM BENZOATE.reason: Preservative linked to hyperactivity. Forms benzene with Vitamin C.

POTASSIUM SORBATE.label: NEUTRAL
POTASSIUM SORBATE.reason: Common preservative. Generally considered safe at food-grade concentrations.

SODIUM METABISULPHITE.label: BAD
SODIUM METABISULPHITE.reason: Sulphite preservative (E-223). Can trigger asthma and allergic reactions.

TBHQ.label: BAD
TBHQ.reason: Synthetic antioxidant preservative. Linked to immune issues at high doses.

BHA.label: BAD
BHA.reason: Synthetic preservative. Classified as possibly carcinogenic by IARC.

BHT.label: BAD
BHT.reason: Synthetic antioxidant. Controversial — possible endocrine disruptor.

ASPARTAME.label: BAD
ASPARTAME.reason: Artificial sweetener. WHO classified as possibly carcinogenic (Group 2B) in 2023.

SACCHARIN.label: BAD
SACCHARIN.reason: Oldest artificial sweetener. May disrupt gut microbiome.

SUCRALOSE.label: NEUTRAL
SUCRALOSE.reason: Artificial sweetener. Generally considered safe but may affect gut bacteria.

VITAMIN C.label: GOOD
VITAMIN C.reason: Essential vitamin and antioxidant. Supports immunity and iron absorption.

VITAMIN D.label: GOOD
VITAMIN D.reason: Essential vitamin for bone health and immune function.

CALCIUM.label: GOOD
CALCIUM.reason: Essential mineral for bone and teeth health.

ZINC.label: GOOD
ZINC.reason: Essential mineral for immune function and wound healing.

INULIN.label: GOOD
INULIN.reason: Prebiotic fibre — feeds beneficial gut bacteria. Supports digestive health.

PECTIN.label: GOOD
PECTIN.reason: Natural soluble fibre from fruit. Supports gut health and cholesterol.

GUAR GUM.label: NEUTRAL
GUAR GUM.reason: Natural thickener from guar beans. High doses may cause digestive issues.

COCOA MASS.label: GOOD
COCOA MASS.reason: Pure ground cacao — rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, iron and magnesium. The healthiest part of chocolate.

COCOA SOLIDS.label: GOOD
COCOA SOLIDS.reason: Pure cocoa — rich in antioxidants and flavonoids. Supports heart and brain health.

COCOA BUTTER.label: GOOD
COCOA BUTTER.reason: Natural fat from cacao beans. Contains stearic acid which doesn't raise LDL cholesterol. Rich in antioxidants.

COCOA POWDER.label: GOOD
COCOA POWDER.reason: Pure unsweetened cocoa — excellent source of antioxidants, iron and magnesium.

DARK CHOCOLATE.label: GOOD
DARK CHOCOLATE.reason: High cocoa content dark chocolate — rich in antioxidants and flavonoids. Beneficial in moderation.

BUTTER OIL.label: NEUTRAL
BUTTER OIL.reason: Clarified milk fat (anhydrous butter). Natural dairy fat — provides fat-soluble vitamins.

ANHYDROUS MILK FAT.label: NEUTRAL
ANHYDROUS MILK FAT.reason: Pure clarified butter fat. Natural dairy ingredient. Use in moderation.

FRUCTOSE.label: BAD
FRUCTOSE.reason: Excess fructose linked to fatty liver and metabolic disorders. However, in trace amounts (as in high-cocoa chocolate), impact is minimal.

EMULSIFIER (SOY LECITHIN).label: GOOD
EMULSIFIER (SOY LECITHIN).reason: Natural emulsifier from soy. Supports brain and liver health. Safe and beneficial.

SOY LECITHIN.label: GOOD
SOY LECITHIN.reason: Natural emulsifier from soy or sunflower. Supports brain health.

SUNFLOWER LECITHIN.label: GOOD
SUNFLOWER LECITHIN.reason: Natural emulsifier from sunflower. Non-GMO alternative to soy lecithin.

NATURAL FLAVOURING.label: NEUTRAL
NATURAL FLAVOURING.reason: Derived from natural sources. Generally safe. Better than artificial flavouring.

VANILLA.label: GOOD
VANILLA.reason: Natural spice with antioxidant properties. Safe and beneficial flavouring.

WHOLE MILK POWDER.label: NEUTRAL
WHOLE MILK POWDER.reason: Full-fat dried milk. Provides protein and calcium but high in saturated fat.

SKIM MILK POWDER.label: GOOD
SKIM MILK POWDER.reason: Low fat dried milk. Good source of protein and calcium.

HAZELNUTS.label: GOOD
HAZELNUTS.reason: Rich in healthy monounsaturated fats, vitamin E, magnesium and antioxidants.

ALMONDS.label: GOOD
ALMONDS.reason: Excellent source of Vitamin E, magnesium, healthy fats and fibre.

OATS.label: GOOD
OATS.reason: Whole grain — rich in beta-glucan fibre. Supports heart health and blood sugar.

CANE SUGAR.label: BAD
CANE SUGAR.reason: Refined sugar — empty calories, spikes blood sugar. Less processed than white sugar but still harmful in excess.

BROWN SUGAR.label: BAD
BROWN SUGAR.reason: Refined sugar with molasses. Slightly more minerals than white sugar but still causes blood sugar spikes.

SODIUM BICARBONATE.label: GOOD
SODIUM BICARBONATE.reason: Baking soda — natural leavening agent. Safe and commonly used in baking.

BAKING POWDER.label: NEUTRAL
BAKING POWDER.reason: Leavening agent — mixture of baking soda and acid. Safe in normal quantities.

BAKING SODA.label: GOOD
BAKING SODA.reason: Natural leavening agent (sodium bicarbonate). Safe and commonly used.

ANTIOXIDANT.label: NEUTRAL
ANTIOXIDANT.reason: Prevents oxidation and extends shelf life. Safety depends on specific compound used.

ANTIOXIDANT (INS 320).label: BAD
ANTIOXIDANT (INS 320).reason: BHA (E320) — synthetic antioxidant. Classified as possibly carcinogenic by IARC.

CORN.label: NEUTRAL
CORN.reason: Whole corn grain — provides carbohydrates and some fibre. Moderate nutritional value.

EDIBLE COMMON SALT.label: NEUTRAL
EDIBLE COMMON SALT.reason: Essential mineral in small amounts. Excess sodium linked to high blood pressure.

EDIBLE SALT.label: NEUTRAL
EDIBLE SALT.reason: Essential mineral in small amounts. Excess sodium linked to high blood pressure.

ACIDITY REGULATOR.label: NEUTRAL
ACIDITY REGULATOR.reason: Controls pH in food products. Safety varies by specific compound used.

ANTICAKING AGENT.label: NEUTRAL
ANTICAKING AGENT.reason: Prevents clumping in powdered foods. Generally safe in small quantities.

STABILISER.label: NEUTRAL
STABILISER.reason: Maintains food texture and consistency. Generally safe in approved quantities.

HUMECTANT.label: NEUTRAL
HUMECTANT.reason: Retains moisture in food products. Safety depends on specific compound used.

WHOLE GRAIN.label: GOOD
WHOLE GRAIN.reason: Whole grain — retains bran and germ, high in fibre, vitamins and minerals.

MULTIGRAIN.label: GOOD
MULTIGRAIN.reason: Multiple whole grains — diverse fibre, vitamins and minerals.

WHOLE GRAIN FLAKES.label: GOOD
WHOLE GRAIN FLAKES.reason: Whole grain cereal — high in fibre and complex carbohydrates.

MULTIGRAIN FLAKES.label: GOOD
MULTIGRAIN FLAKES.reason: Multiple whole grains in flake form — high in fibre and nutrients.

ROLLED OATS.label: GOOD
ROLLED OATS.reason: Whole grain oats — excellent source of beta-glucan fibre. Supports heart health.

BARLEY FLAKES.label: GOOD
BARLEY FLAKES.reason: Whole grain barley — high in soluble fibre, especially beta-glucan. Supports cholesterol.

BARLEY.label: GOOD
BARLEY.reason: Whole grain — excellent source of soluble fibre and B vitamins.

BROWN RICE.label: GOOD
BROWN RICE.reason: Whole grain rice — retains bran layer, higher fibre than white rice.

BROWN RICE FLAKES.label: GOOD
BROWN RICE FLAKES.reason: Whole grain brown rice flakes — good source of fibre and minerals.

QUINOA.label: GOOD
QUINOA.reason: Complete protein grain — contains all 9 essential amino acids. High in fibre and minerals.

QUINOA PUFFS.label: GOOD
QUINOA PUFFS.reason: Puffed quinoa — retains complete protein and fibre profile.

FRUITS.label: GOOD
FRUITS.reason: Natural fruits — rich in vitamins, antioxidants and dietary fibre.

RAISINS.label: GOOD
RAISINS.reason: Dried grapes — natural source of iron, potassium and antioxidants. High natural sugar.

CANDIED PAPAYA.label: NEUTRAL
CANDIED PAPAYA.reason: Papaya preserved with sugar — loses some nutrients, added sugar is a concern.

STRAWBERRY PULP.label: GOOD
STRAWBERRY PULP.reason: Natural strawberry — rich in Vitamin C, antioxidants and fibre.

CANDIED APPLE.label: NEUTRAL
CANDIED APPLE.reason: Apple preserved with sugar — some fruit nutrition retained but high in added sugar.

DRIED FRUITS.label: GOOD
DRIED FRUITS.reason: Concentrated source of fibre, iron and antioxidants from natural fruits.

NUT.label: GOOD
NUT.reason: Nuts are rich in healthy fats, protein, fibre and minerals.

NUTS.label: GOOD
NUTS.reason: Rich in healthy monounsaturated and polyunsaturated fats, protein and minerals.

SEEDS.label: GOOD
SEEDS.reason: Rich in healthy fats, protein, fibre and micronutrients.

NUT & SEEDS.label: GOOD
NUT & SEEDS.reason: Combination of nuts and seeds — excellent source of healthy fats, protein and minerals.

NUTS AND SEEDS.label: GOOD
NUTS AND SEEDS.reason: Excellent source of healthy fats, protein, fibre and essential minerals.

PUMPKIN SEEDS.label: GOOD
PUMPKIN SEEDS.reason: Rich in zinc, magnesium, healthy fats and antioxidants.

FLAX SEEDS.label: GOOD
FLAX SEEDS.reason: Rich in omega-3 fatty acids (ALA), lignans and fibre. Anti-inflammatory.

CHIA SEEDS.label: GOOD
CHIA SEEDS.reason: Excellent source of omega-3 ALA, fibre, calcium and antioxidants.

SUNFLOWER SEEDS.label: GOOD
SUNFLOWER SEEDS.reason: Rich in Vitamin E, selenium and healthy fats.

WALNUTS.label: GOOD
WALNUTS.reason: Rich in omega-3 ALA, antioxidants and brain-supporting nutrients.

CASHEWS.label: GOOD
CASHEWS.reason: Rich in copper, magnesium and healthy monounsaturated fats.

PISTACHIOS.label: GOOD
PISTACHIOS.reason: High in protein, fibre, potassium and antioxidants.

JAGGERY POWDER.label: NEUTRAL
JAGGERY POWDER.reason: Powdered unrefined cane sugar. Contains trace minerals. Less processed than white sugar but still high GI.

COCONUT SUGAR.label: NEUTRAL
COCONUT SUGAR.reason: Lower GI than refined sugar. Contains trace minerals but still a sugar — use in moderation.

DATE SUGAR.label: NEUTRAL
DATE SUGAR.reason: Made from dried dates — retains some fibre and minerals. Better than refined sugar.

TEXTURED SOY PROTEIN.label: GOOD
TEXTURED SOY PROTEIN.reason: Complete plant protein from soy — high protein, low fat. Good meat alternative.

SOY PROTEIN.label: GOOD
SOY PROTEIN.reason: Complete plant protein — contains all essential amino acids.

PEA PROTEIN.label: GOOD
PEA PROTEIN.reason: Plant-based complete protein. High in branched-chain amino acids.

ACIDITY REGULATOR (INS 330).label: GOOD
ACIDITY REGULATOR (INS 330).reason: Citric acid (INS 330) — natural acid from citrus fruit. Safe preservative.

THICKENER (INS 440).label: NEUTRAL
THICKENER (INS 440).reason: Pectin (INS 440) — natural thickener from fruit. Prebiotic fibre. Safe and beneficial.

NATURE IDENTICAL FLAVOURING SUBSTANCE.label: NEUTRAL
NATURE IDENTICAL FLAVOURING SUBSTANCE.reason: Nature-identical flavours — chemically synthesised to match natural flavours. Generally safe.

NATURE IDENTICAL FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES.label: NEUTRAL
NATURE IDENTICAL FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES.reason: Nature-identical flavours — chemically synthesised to match natural flavours. Generally safe.

STRAWBERRY CRUSH.label: NEUTRAL
STRAWBERRY CRUSH.reason: Processed fruit crush — some fruit nutrition but often contains added sugar.

100.name: Curcumin
100.label: GOOD
100.reason: Natural yellow pigment from turmeric. Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory.

101.name: Riboflavin (B2)
101.label: GOOD
101.reason: Natural vitamin B2. Used as yellow colour. Essential nutrient.

102.name: Tartrazine
102.label: BAD
102.reason: Synthetic yellow dye. Linked to hyperactivity and allergic reactions.

110.name: Sunset Yellow
110.label: BAD
110.reason: Synthetic orange dye. Linked to hyperactivity in children.

120.name: Cochineal
120.label: NEUTRAL
120.reason: Natural red dye from insects. Can trigger allergic reactions.

129.name: Allura Red
129.label: BAD
129.reason: Synthetic red dye. Linked to hyperactivity. Banned in some countries.

160a.name: Beta Carotene
160a.label: GOOD
160a.reason: Natural orange pigment. Vitamin A precursor and antioxidant.

162.name: Beetroot Red
162.label: GOOD
162.reason: Natural red pigment from beetroot. Contains beneficial antioxidants.

171.name: Titanium Dioxide
171.label: BAD
171.reason: White pigment. EFSA concluded it can no longer be considered safe (2021).

200.name: Sorbic Acid
200.label: NEUTRAL
200.reason: Natural preservative. Generally safe at food concentrations.

202.name: Potassium Sorbate
202.label: NEUTRAL
202.reason: Common preservative. Considered safe. May affect gut microbiome at high doses.

210.name: Benzoic Acid
210.label: BAD
210.reason: Can form carcinogenic benzene when combined with Vitamin C.

211.name: Sodium Benzoate
211.label: BAD
211.reason: Linked to hyperactivity in children. Forms carcinogenic benzene with Vitamin C.

220.name: Sulphur Dioxide
220.label: BAD
220.reason: Sulphite preservative. Can trigger asthma attacks and allergic reactions.

221.name: Sodium Sulphite
221.label: BAD
221.reason: Sulphite preservative. Triggers reactions in sensitive individuals.

223.name: Sodium Metabisulphite
223.label: BAD
223.reason: Sulphite preservative. Can trigger asthma and severe allergic reactions.

224.name: Potassium Metabisulphite
224.label: BAD
224.reason: Sulphite preservative. Allergen risk for asthma sufferers.

250.name: Sodium Nitrite
250.label: BAD
250.reason: Meat preservative. Strongly linked to colorectal cancer risk.

300.name: Ascorbic Acid (Vit C)
300.label: GOOD
300.reason: Vitamin C — essential antioxidant. Preserves freshness naturally.

301.name: Sodium Ascorbate
301.label: GOOD
301.reason: Vitamin C salt — antioxidant preservative. Beneficial nutrient.

319.name: TBHQ
319.label: BAD
319.reason: Synthetic antioxidant. Linked to immune issues at high concentrations.

320.name: BHA
320.label: BAD
320.reason: Possibly carcinogenic synthetic preservative (IARC Group 2B). Banned in some countries.

321.name: BHT
321.label: BAD
321.reason: Synthetic antioxidant. Controversial — possible endocrine disruptor.

322.name: Lecithin
322.label: GOOD
322.reason: Natural emulsifier from soy/sunflower. Supports brain and liver health.

322(i).name: Lecithin
322(i).label: GOOD
322(i).reason: Natural emulsifier. Derived from soy or sunflower. Safe and beneficial.

330.name: Citric Acid
330.label: GOOD
330.reason: Natural acid from citrus fruit. Safe preservative and flavour enhancer.

420.name: Sorbitol
420.label: NEUTRAL
420.reason: Sugar alcohol sweetener. Can cause digestive discomfort in large amounts.

471.name: Mono and Diglycerides
471.label: BAD
471.reason: Synthetic emulsifier. May contain trace trans fats. Ultra-processed.

472e.name: DATEM
472e.label: BAD
472e.reason: Diacetyl tartaric acid ester — synthetic emulsifier. Ultra-processed.

476.name: Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate
476.label: BAD
476.reason: Synthetic emulsifier from castor oil. Ultra-processed additive.

481.name: Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate
481.label: NEUTRAL
481.reason: Emulsifier used in baking. Generally considered safe.

500.name: Sodium Carbonates
500.label: NEUTRAL
500.reason: Raising agent (baking soda family). Safe in normal food quantities.

500(ii).name: Sodium Bicarbonate
500(ii).label: GOOD
500(ii).reason: Baking soda — natural leavening agent. Safe and commonly used.

503.name: Ammonium Carbonates
503.label: NEUTRAL
503.reason: Leavening agent. Safe — ammonia dissipates completely during baking.

503(ii).name: Ammonium Bicarbonate
503(ii).label: NEUTRAL
503(ii).reason: Baking leavener. Dissipates completely during baking. Safe.

621.name: MSG
621.label: NEUTRAL
621.reason: Monosodium glutamate. Widely studied — safe for most people. High sodium.

924.name: Potassium Bromate
924.label: BAD
924.reason: Flour improver. Classified as possibly carcinogenic. Banned in many countries.

951.name: Aspartame
951.label: BAD
951.reason: Artificial sweetener. WHO classified as possibly carcinogenic (2023).

954.name: Saccharin
954.label: BAD
954.reason: Oldest artificial sweetener. May disrupt gut microbiome.

955.name: Sucralose
955.label: NEUTRAL
955.reason: Artificial sweetener. Generally safe but may affect gut bacteria.

960.name: Steviol Glycosides
960.label: GOOD
960.reason: Natural stevia-derived sweetener. Does not spike blood sugar.

1422.name: Acetylated Distarch Adipate
1422.label: BAD
1422.reason: Modified starch — chemically altered. Ultra-processed thickener.

122.name: Azorubine
122.label: BAD
122.reason: Synthetic red dye. Part of Southampton Six — strongly linked to hyperactivity in children.

124.name: Ponceau 4R
124.label: BAD
124.reason: Synthetic red dye. Part of Southampton Six — linked to hyperactivity. Banned in USA.

127.name: Erythrosine
127.label: BAD
127.reason: Synthetic red dye. Contains iodine — can affect thyroid function.

440.name: Pectin
440.label: GOOD
440.reason: Natural soluble fibre from fruit. Prebiotic — supports gut health.

412.name: Guar Gum
412.label: NEUTRAL
412.reason: Natural thickener from guar beans. Generally safe.

407.name: Carrageenan
407.label: BAD
407.reason: Linked to gut inflammation in some studies. Controversial additive.

451.name: Triphosphates
451.label: NEUTRAL
451.reason: Phosphate additive — generally safe but contributes to phosphate load.

452.name: Polyphosphates
452.label: NEUTRAL
452.reason: Phosphate stabiliser — generally safe in approved quantities.

500(i).name: Sodium Carbonate
500(i).label: NEUTRAL
500(i).reason: Acidity regulator. Safe in normal food quantities.
